title: Drug Use Screening Tests: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
ailable from: https://drugabuse.com/treatment/withdrawal/ 
American Addiction Centers [Internet]. Alcohol; Assessment; c2024.Assessment Tools Used to Diagnose Alcohol Use Disorders; [updated 2024 Feb 7; cited 2024 Feb 27]; [about 12 screens]. Available from: https://americanaddictioncenters.org/alcohol/assessment 
Johns Hopkins Medicine [Internet]. Baltimore: The Johns Hopkins University; c2023. Health: Substance Use Disorder; [cited 2023 Sep 21]; [about 4 screens]. Available from: https://www.hopkinsmedicine.org/health/conditions-and-diseases/substance-abuse-chemical-dependency 
Mayo Clinic [Internet]. Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research; c1998-2023. Drug addiction (substance use disorder); [cited 2024 Feb 27]; [about 14 screens]. Available from: https://www.mayoclinic.org/diseases-conditions/drug-addiction/symptoms-causes/syc-20365112 
Mayo Clinic [Internet]. Mayo Foundation for Medical Education and Research; c1998-2023. Mental health providers: Tips on finding one; 2023 Apr 14 [cited 2023 Sep 21]; [about 3 screens]. Available from: https://www.mayoclinic.org/diseases-conditions/mental-illness/in-depth/mental-health-providers/art-20045530?p=1 
MD+Calc. [Internet]. c2024. Drug Abuse Screening Test-10 (DAST-10). [cited 2025 Jul 2]; [about 2 screens]. Available from: https://www.mdcalc.com/calc/10526/drug-abuse-screening-test-10-dast-10
